title: Create: Weighted Copycats
description: An addon for Create: Aeronautics that adds weighted copycats!
body:
# Create: Weighted Copycats

This is a addon for **Create: Aeronautics** that adds copycat blocks that have different weights.
No need to hide iron blocks. You can now just use these!




## Content:  
Only adds normal copycat blocks in the four weights. (as of right now)  
****To get them you search in the creative menu!****


**Current weights:**  
Super Heavy (4 kpg)    
Heavy (2 kpg)  
Light (1 kpg)   
Super Light (0.5 kpg)

## This mod is quite barebones and doesnt have much going for it!
Quickly put this together in like 20 mins.  
If it gets enough attention I will probably add more weights and copycat shapes.  
Might add compat with [Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) in the future.
